title: coccocypselum aureum
intro: Coccocypselum aureum, also known as the Yellow Bells or Orange Bells, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub-like plant that produces bright yellow, bell-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Coccocypselum aureum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
